flags.message: The predict prompt tells cert predictors to anchor on the 'Modern discretionary-cert petitions by disposition' section of metrics/statpack.md, but the committed statpack has no such section (it ends at the SCOTUS-petitions-by-Term table, whose resolved counts are all zero for recent Terms). Predictors currently have no committed modern cert-stage base rate and must reconstruct it from fedcourts query priors.
